title: My input form doesnt show the file upload option although it is part of the form when i go to edit
excerpt: I have created a form that picks up the fields from the board. The board has an attachment cokumn which has also been added in the input form. However, this option is only visible in the edit form but not in the preview …

posts.author: OJindahouse (Oshin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a form that picks up the fields from the board. The board has an attachment cokumn which has also been added in the input form. However, this option is only visible in the edit form but not in the preview or to external users who open the form link.

The edit form section where ‘Required Documents’ is visible:

image526×630 18.9 KB

The preview where it is not visible -

image631×270 12.1 KB

ANY SOLUTIONS OUT THERE??
